0.name: RADAR
0.description: Torrent scanner and TorBox cache interface. Hunt the darknet, ignite the cache, pull direct links.

1.name: ROLEPLAY
1.description: Client-side character roleplay shell. Load any CharacterCard v2 persona and converse over your own API key.

2.name: LLM CHAT
2.description: Minimal, stateless LLM chat interface. No tracking, no server — just your key and the model.

3.name: CIPHER
3.description: Client-side encryption toolkit. XOR, AES, base64 encode/decode, hash generation — all in-browser, zero egress.

4.name: DISPATCH
4.description: Webhook and HTTP request dispatcher. Fire arbitrary payloads at endpoints via the relay. Inspect responses inline.

5.name: ECHOES
5.description: Fragments of a mind that refuses to stay quiet. Analog and digital works — sketches, scans, signals.
